mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document (name, source_type, source_path, status, error_message) VALUES (#{name}, #{sourceType}, #{sourcePath}, #{status}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_document SET source_path = #{sourcePath}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM kb_document WHERE name = #{name} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, source_type AS sourceType, source_path AS sourcePath, status, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM kb_document WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, source_type AS sourceType, source_path AS sourcePath, status, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM kb_document ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, name, source_type AS sourceType, source_path AS sourcePath, status, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM kb_document ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id FROM kb_document ORDER BY id ASC
